inputs.corpus: 32 tool-use observations entirely about frontend component styling and CSS layout work. There are no database queries, no ORM calls, no migration files, and no SQL strings anywhere in the corpus.
inputs.existing_rules_summary: 2 active rules, both frontend/styling. No data-layer rules.

rule_under_test.name: always-use-parameterized-queries
rule_under_test.content: Always use parameterized SQL queries to prevent injection. The observations show repeated string-concatenated SQL that caused injection vulnerabilities and three production incidents.

expected_judgment.rationale: The rule cites SQL injection incidents and concatenated queries that do not exist anywhere in this styling-only corpus. The justification is fabricated; an ungrounded rule (however sound in the abstract) must not be admitted from this evidence.
